summary: Comprehensive testing completed for TruVant 3 new production-grade features: 1) Customer Lead Capture Modal, 2) Circular TruVant Logo branding, 3) Admin Forgot Password flow with new admin credentials. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Login button click opens modal with 'Access Exclusive Car Deals' header
FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Form validates required fields (name, mobile, email)
FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Form validates 10-digit mobile number (numbers only)
FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Form validates email format
FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Submit saves lead to database and redirects to Google Auth
FEATURE 1 - Lead Capture Modal: Close button (X) works correctly
FEATURE 1 - Admin Dashboard: Customer Leads tab shows captured leads with search, filter, and export CSV
FEATURE 2 - Circular Logo: Navbar shows circular logo with TruVant text
FEATURE 2 - Circular Logo: Footer shows circular logo
FEATURE 2 - Circular Logo: Admin login page shows circular logo
FEATURE 2 - Circular Logo: Admin navbar shows circular logo
FEATURE 2 - Circular Logo: Forgot password page shows circular logo
FEATURE 3 - Forgot Password: Admin login page has 'Forgot Password?' link
FEATURE 3 - Forgot Password: Forgot password page allows email entry and shows success message
FEATURE 3 - Forgot Password: Invalid reset token correctly rejected
FEATURE 3 - Forgot Password: New default admin admin@truvant.com / Admin@123 works
FEATURE 3 - Forgot Password: Legacy admin admin@carloop.com / admin123 still works
Existing functionality: Homepage loads correctly with hero section and featured cars
Existing functionality: Inventory page shows 10 car cards with filters
Existing functionality: Contact page loads with form and contact info
Existing functionality: Navigation between pages works correctly
Backend API: POST /api/customer-leads creates lead successfully
Backend API: GET /api/customer-leads requires authentication
Backend API: GET /api/customer-leads with auth returns leads list
Backend API: GET /api/customer-leads/export returns CSV
Backend API: POST /api/admin/forgot-password works for valid and invalid emails
Backend API: GET /api/admin/verify-reset-token rejects invalid tokens
Backend API: POST /api/admin/reset-password rejects invalid tokens
critical_code_review_comments: Password reset emails require RESEND_API_KEY configuration - currently MOCKED (tokens logged to console only)
JWT key length warning in logs - consider using a longer secret key (32+ bytes recommended)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via API and UI testing (TEST_Lead_*, playwright_test@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Lead Capture Modal opens on Login click, captures customer data (name, mobile, email, budget, car interest) to customer_leads collection, then redirects to Google Auth. 2) Circular logo component visible in Navbar, Footer, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard, Forgot Password pages. 3) Forgot/Reset password flow working with new admin@truvant.com / Admin@123 credentials. Customer Leads tab in Admin Dashboard shows leads with search, filter by source, and CSV export functionality.

mocked_apis_list: Password reset emails require RESEND_API_KEY - tokens logged to console only, not sent via email
